sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45642" key="e)fekkaide/katos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφεκκαιδέκᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing the ratio</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1599.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl>: <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1599.tlg001:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl>, Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1599.tlg001:p.69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.69</biblScope> </bibl> H., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐφεξκαιδέκατος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
